description: The 'System Status' page at http://acmecorp.test/status.php is down due to configuration errors in `public_html/includes/db_config.php` within the `acmecorp.test` virtual server. Restore the site's functionality by setting the permissions of `db_config.php` to 644 and updating the database password in the file to `GymAnything123!`. The task is complete when the status page displays 'System Operational'.
